manual_checks.name: 保護パスへの今回の編集有無を確認する
manual_checks.details: This pass edited runtime files plus WORKFLOW.md to add the new compaction and artifact contract fields required by the implementation request.

notes: PASS: uv run ruff format --check app/ tests/
PASS: uv run python -m pytest tests/test_verification_profiles.py tests/test_workflow_schema.py tests/test_pipeline.py tests/test_pipeline_e2e.py -q
PASS: uv run python -m pytest tests/test_codex_app_server_backend.py tests/test_codex_runner.py tests/test_pipeline.py tests/test_pipeline_e2e.py -q
PASS: uv run python -m pytest tests -q
Full repository pytest passed with 362 tests in 13.50s.
Candidate mode trigger thresholds are now read from WORKFLOW config instead of hard-coded runtime defaults.
Codex run specs now propagate allow_thread_resume_same_run_only from workflow-driven pipeline decisions.
Verification planning now emits repair profiles and repair checks for python, TypeScript, and mixed repositories.
Pipeline now persists repair_feedback.json/jsonl, review_decision.json, and postable_findings.json, and proof-of-work requires them.
Codex app-server backend now supports thread/read and session rollover persists a session snapshot into session_checkpoint.json and session_handoff_bundle.json.
